problem id: f8c6ea2c
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7) AND SHL(5)

examples:
  11101001 -> 00100000
  00001111 -> 10000000
  00100111 -> 10000000
  10110010 -> 01000000
  10001000 -> 00000000
  10011010 -> 01000000
  10000011 -> 01000000
  11111101 -> 10100000

query: 00110001
predicted answer: 00000000
